weak_aliases.reason: Source labels and local observation IDs are useful for search but not merge authority.

suggested_rules: Merge route records sharing the same route_id and borough when no variant distinction exists and both reference the same transit program/context.
rationale: Both records describe the MTA B68 bus route in Brooklyn. They share the identity key 'route_b68' (flagged as duplicate_global_identity), identical route_id 'B68', same borough 'Brooklyn', and both relate to the Automated Camera Enforcement (ACE) program. The negative signal 'variant mismatch: unknown vs unknown' indicates neither record carries a variant label, so there is no actual variant conflict. The only difference is the source document, which is expected for the same real-world route observed from different data sources.
